Meta.title: My Skills
Meta.description: Personal Claude Code skill library in the cloud

skillForm.namePattern: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only; must start with a letter

skillApi.conflict: SHA conflict: the remote was updated. Refresh and retry.
skillApi.invalidBody: Request body is missing required fields or malformed
skillApi.unauthorized: Unauthorized: please sign in via Cloudflare Access and retry

MySkills.tagline: Personal Claude Code skill library in the cloud

list.title: All Skills
list.subtitle: Click a card to view details, or upload a new skill from the top right
list.empty: No skills yet. Upload your first one.
list.errorDetail: Could not fetch the skill list from the server

detail.deleteConfirmDesc: This removes the file from the GitHub repo and triggers a new Pages build. You can recover it from git history.
detail.notFoundDesc: It may have been deleted or the name is incorrect

upload.title: Upload New Skill
upload.subtitle: Supports single .md file or .zip archive (unzipped in-browser)
upload.updateSubtitle: Modify content or metadata and resubmit. Name is immutable.

dropzone.invalidType: Unsupported file type. Only .md and .zip are allowed.

token.title: GitHub Token
token.desc: First-time visitors need a fine-grained Personal Access Token (Contents: Read & Write on my-skills repo only).
token.helper: The token is stored in your browser's localStorage. The site is protected by Cloudflare Access.

form.name: Identifier (name)
form.nameHint: Used as the filename name.md in the GitHub repo
form.nameLocked: Name is immutable in update mode
form.descriptionPlaceholder: One-liner about what this skill does
form.previewEmpty: Markdown preview will appear here after you select a file
form.previewHint: Frontmatter is auto-filled into the form after you upload a .md file

result.successBuildingLine: Cloudflare Pages is building; live in ~30 seconds
result.errorConflict: GitHub returned 409: SHA conflict — refresh and retry.
